rationale: The user requested a futuristic AI assistant with 'live glowing animations' keeping the dark theme and emerald green accents. This falls perfectly into the Electric & Neon archetype. We will use deep obsidian/indigo for the void and vibrant emerald for the cybernetic neon glows.

spacing_and_layout.sidebar: w-[280px] shrink-0 border-r border-white/5 bg-[#0A0C10] flex flex-col transition-all duration-300
spacing_and_layout.main_canvas: flex-1 flex flex-col relative overflow-hidden bg-[#0A0C10]
spacing_and_layout.composer_wrapper: p-4 w-full max-w-4xl mx-auto bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0A0C10] via-[#0A0C10] to-transparent pt-12

sidebar_item.default: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-text_secondary hover:text-text_primary hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors cursor-pointer group
sidebar_item.active: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-primary bg-primary/10 transition-colors cursor-pointer border border-primary/20 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(16,185,129,0.1)]

chat_bubble.user: bg-surface border border-white/5 rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-5 py-4 max-w-[85%] self-end
chat_bubble.ai: bg-transparent rounded-2xl px-5 py-4 max-w-[100%] self-start flex gap-4

composer.wrapper: relative rounded-2xl bg-surface border border-white/10 shadow-2xl focus-within:border-primary/50 focus-within:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(16,185,129,0.15)] transition-all duration-300
composer.input: w-full bg-transparent text-text_primary placeholder:text-text_secondary resize-none outline-none py-4 px-4 min-h-[56px] max-h-[200px]

mode_pill.default: px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border border-white/10 text-text_secondary hover:text-white transition-colors cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-2 bg-surface/50
mode_pill.active: px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border border-primary/30 text-primary bg-primary/10 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(16,185,129,0.2)] flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer

images.description: Abstract cinematic glowing emerald green orb to be used as a background element or avatar in the hero state.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for all standard icons (Sparkles, Search, Image, Apps, Plus, Send, Mic, Paperclip). Ensure icons within active areas carry a subtle glow via drop-shadow.

instructions_to_main_agent: Theme Foundation: Use #0A0C10 for the main app background, completely replacing default Vercel/Shadcn palettes.
Animations: Implement a glowing CSS border or Framer Motion wrapper for the composer when focused.

Hero State: Before chat begins, show 'What can I help you build today?' using the gradient_text utility, and feature a softly floating emerald orb (use the provided image or pure CSS radial-gradient orb with framer-motion float).
Sidebar: Recreate ChatGPT-like nav (New Chat, Search, Images, Apps, Deep Research) but inject the neon aesthetic. Active state should be emerald tinted.
Deep Research Mode: This should feel like a 'hacker mode' terminal, utilizing the JetBrains Mono font for reasoning steps and logs.
Streaming Backend: Connect all chat requests to 'ai.tetrific.com' as per user instruction. Implement token-by-token reveal.
Data-TestID: ALWAYS include 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., 'sidebar-new-chat', 'chat-input', 'chat-submit-btn') on interactive elements.
Auth: Implement Supabase Auth (Email/Password + Google) using a glassmorphic modal overlay.
